verification_questions.question: Does the E2E test use test.describe.serial() with User A (admin) and User B (invitee)?
verification_questions.expected: Yes — test.describe.serial block with bootUser for USER_A and USER_B

verification_questions.question: Does User A create a group and generate an invite link via GenerateInviteLinkModal?
verification_questions.expected: Yes — createGroup() then clicks invite-link-btn, reads URL from invite-link-url test ID, copies link

verification_questions.question: Does User B navigate to the invite link URL, see JoinRequestCard, and click 'Request to Join'?
verification_questions.expected: Yes — navigates to the path+query extracted from inviteUrl, verifies join-request-card visible, clicks join-request-btn

verification_questions.question: Does User A see the bell counter increment and PendingRequestsSection with User B's request?
verification_questions.expected: Yes — polls for notification-badge visibility, opens group detail, verifies pending-requests-section visible

verification_questions.question: Does User A click Approve and User B receive a Welcome with the group appearing in their list?
verification_questions.expected: Yes — clicks approve-request-btn, waits for section to disappear; User B navigates to /groups/ and verifies group name visible

verification_questions.question: Does clearAppState include quizzl-invite-links and quizzl-join-requests databases?
verification_questions.expected: Yes — both added to the INDEXEDDB_DATABASES array

verification_questions.question: Are there any production code changes in S9?
verification_questions.expected: No — only test files and helpers modified
